heading: Purchase of seeds and plants for distribution
label: 2241b Purchase of seeds and plants for distribution
text: Purchase and distribution of vegetable, field, and flower seeds, plants, shrubs, vines, bulbs, and cuttings shall be of the freshest and best obtainable varieties and adapted to general cultivation.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 415 of this title
Amendments1896—Act , struck out “by the Department of Agriculture” and “trees”, and inserted “vegetable, field, and flower seeds” and “bulbs”.Apr. 25, 1896
amendments: Amendments1896—Act , struck out “by the Department of Agriculture” and “trees”, and inserted “vegetable, field, and flower seeds” and “bulbs”.Apr. 25, 1896
